name: scopeflow-ai
description: ScopeFlow AI monorepo (client, server, and database tooling).

scripts.setup: npm run install:client && npm run install:database
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: cd server && python manage.py check && python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run
scripts.test: cd server && python manage.py test proposals --keepdb
